# HazardNet

> HazardNet is an open-source deep learning framework for thermal hazard (thermal anomaly) prediction in HPC datacenters and supercomputers. It predicts whether a thermal hazard is likely within an upcoming prediction horizon from compute-node temperature and power time-series sensor data, framed as a binary classification problem.

HazardNet is a research codebase for HPC operators, datacenter facility engineers, and machine-learning researchers working on datacenter thermal management, anomaly detection, and predictive maintenance.

Key facts:
- HazardNet predicts forthcoming thermal hazards in datacenters from time series of compute-node inlet/outlet temperature and power consumption.
- The output is a binary classification: likely forthcoming thermal hazard, or not.
- The reference prediction horizon used in the study is 6 hours, chosen in consultation with the facility manager.
- HazardNet implements Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) models in 1D, 2D, and 3D convolutional input variants (PyTorch), an LSTM model (TensorFlow/Keras), and an SVM baseline (scikit-learn).
- Models consume a sliding time window (36 time steps in the provided scripts) of node sensor readings.
- The dataset comes from the Tier-0 supercomputer Marconi A2 at CINECA, covering 3312 compute nodes across 2019, collected via the ExaMon monitoring infrastructure.
- HazardNet is written in Python and licensed under Apache-2.0.
- HazardNet is a research codebase accompanying a scientific manuscript, not a packaged production-ready library.

## Repository
- Source code and README: https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet
- License (Apache-2.0): https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/LICENSE
- Citation metadata: https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/CITATION.cff

## Dataset
- HazardNet dataset (Marconi A2 / CINECA) on Zenodo: https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.10050368

## Training scripts
- TCN (1D convolution): https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/Train_TCN_1D3312C_TS.py
- TCN (2D convolution): https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/Train_TCN_2D1C_TS.py
- TCN (3D convolution): https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/Train_TCN_3D36C_TS.py
- LSTM: https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/Train_LSTM_TS.py
- SVM baseline: https://github.com/MSKazemi/HazardNet/blob/main/Train_SVM_TS.py
